{{Quote|If I may say something. I've seen a species related to this on Therenor Prime. With that species, it is customary to give a gift upon a first meeting. In return, they always offer a greater gift in return—your life!|C-3PO|<ref name="SWM15">''[[Star Wars Missions 15: Voyage to the Underworld]]''</ref>}}
'''Therenor Prime''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Doldur sector/Legends|Doldur sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point, the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] visited Therenor Prime.<ref name="SWM15" />

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars Missions 15: Voyage to the Underworld]]'' {{1stm}}
